arts.ttl: Juventus vs. Empoli: aiming to bounce back
arts.sum: Empoli have only avoided defeat in seven of their last 24 Serie A matches against Juventus (W3 D4), with five of those coming in the second half of the season. Juventus have won 80% of their Serie A home matches against Empoli (W12 D2 L1): among opponents currently in the competition, only against Hellas Verona (85%) do the Bianconeri have a higher percentage of home wins in the competition.

arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The centre-back who joined Newcastle as a free agent after leaving Bournemouth in the summer has only made 13 appearances and is due to move to Turin.

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Juventus to Sign Lloyd Kelly
arts.sum: Juventus have finalised an agreement to sign English defender Lloyd Kelly from Newcastle United. The Bianconeri, who had already welcomed Renato Veiga on a dry loan from Chelsea this transfer window, were in need of additional defensive reinforcement due to injuries to Bremer and Cabal, and more recently, Kalulu. The Lloyd Kelly Profile After exploring various options, including renewed interest in Todibo following summer contacts, and considering Hancko from Feyenoord and Skriniar (who moved from PSG to Fenerbahce), Juventus has landed on Kelly.
